articles.title: NEET UG 2026: NTA eases admit card access, allows download before bank detail verification
articles.summary: Ahead of NEET UG 2026 on June 21, the National Testing Agency has eased admit card access by allowing candidates to download hall tickets without first completing bank account verification linked to fee refunds. The move follows requests from students facing technical or procedural issues, ensuring smoother access to examination documents..

articles.title: MP Board Class 10th second board exam results 2026 released at result.mponline.gov.in: Direct link to download scorecards here
articles.summary: The Madhya Pradesh Board of Secondary Education (MPBSE) has announced the Class 10 Second Examination Result 2026, offering students another opportunity to improve their academic performance. Candidates can access their scorecards online using their roll number and application number.

articles.title: WBJEE admit card 2026 to be released today at wbjeeb.nic.in: Check steps to download hall tickets
articles.summary: WBJEE 2026 results were announced on June 18, opening the next stage of admissions to engineering, technology, architecture and pharmacy courses in West Bengal. Candidates can download their rank cards from the official WBJEEB websites from 4 PM onwards.

articles.title: SSC CGL Tier 2 final answer key 2026 and response sheets released at ssc.gov.in: Direct link to download here
articles.summary: The Staff Selection Commission has released the final answer keys, response sheets and marks for the SSC CGL 2025 Tier-II examination. Candidates can access these documents by logging into the official portal with their credentials.
